automation_goal: watcher/readiness gate -> session source ingest -> validation -> workbook/KPI sandbox refresh -> forecast bundle/readiness ledger -> Race/Fantasy readiness briefs -> notify/commit only on material readiness change
2026_f1_rule: No DRS assumptions. Use energy deployment, battery state, harvest/regen efficiency, cooling pressure, dirty-air cost, traffic cost, and attack/defend energy availability.

status_classes.late: source endpoint expected to arrive later; do not overreact
status_classes.needs_manual_review: source-backed but not clean; no automatic stable prediction changes
